backend_selection.policy: Use an external harness first. Do not vendor or carve emulator code until the prototype proves which pieces are necessary.

input_artifacts.name: renderer_fixture
input_artifacts.purpose: Points to the generated APU RAM seed and records the exact pack load transcript.

input_artifacts.name: apu_ram_seed
input_artifacts.purpose: Diagnostic state seed after applying EarthBound audio load streams.

input_artifacts.name: backend_job
input_artifacts.purpose: Per-track render/capture request consumed by an external backend harness.

diagnostic_expectations: Report whether the backend ran the real SNES/APU boot and load protocol or consumed a completed snapshot.
Report whether CPU/APU port handshakes were executed or mocked.
Report capture/render timing in frames, samples, or cycles.
output_validation: rendered_wav outputs must have a RIFF/WAVE header.
playback/export WAV outputs must be 16-bit PCM stereo at the declared sample rate with data samples matching render metrics.
complete_spc_snapshot outputs must include the SNES-SPC700 signature.
JSON/PCM/hash outputs must be non-empty and match their declared SHA-1.

backend_catalog.license_policy: ISC/permissive candidate; review bundled third-party notices before vendoring
backend_catalog.execution_policy: external harness first; keep emulator code out of core tools until prototype proves the path
backend_catalog.implementation_stage: native diagnostic harness implemented; accurate PCM/WAV renderer pending

backend_catalog.license_policy: LGPL-2.1; requires LGPL notice and linking/compliance policy
backend_catalog.execution_policy: snapshot renderer only after complete SPC state is available
backend_catalog.implementation_stage: libgme SPC renderer implemented out-of-tree; honors backend job render options; source snapshots are fused CHANGE_MUSIC/key-on captures pending emulator oracle comparison

backend_catalog.license_policy: GPL/noncommercial tools must remain optional and out-of-process unless project licensing changes
backend_catalog.execution_policy: optional validation oracle, never a required core dependency

native_ares_harness.current_capability: Consumes backend job JSON, verifies the generated APU RAM seed SHA-1, imports it into ares::SuperFamicom::dsp.apuram, captures public register preflight state, probes the $0500 driver entry with ares' SPC700 disassembler, runs an ares::SPC700 RAM/IO shim with rough timer0 progress, injects the diagnostic APUIO0 track command after timer enable or on the driver's first APUIO0 read, advances into track-specific driver update code, emits state_capture_json plus diagnostic complete_spc_snapshot outputs, records a real last-key-on SPC snapshot when the probe writes a nonzero DSP KON value, and records instruction/sequence evidence for IO, DSP writes, command injection, command first-read events, an ordered command mailbox IO window, and last-key-on timing. A separate ares SMP mailbox smoke now uses real ares SuperFamicom::smp, SuperFamicom::cpu, SuperFamicom::dsp, and WDC65816 instruction execution, delivers the command through smp.portWrite, CPU-side writeAPU($2140, track), a modeled C0:ABBD sep/sta.l $002140 prefix, the full modeled C0:ABBD sep/sta.l/rep/rtl routine, direct ROM-derived C0:ABBD bytes, a modeled JSL into ROM-derived C0:ABBD, the ROM-derived CHANGE_MUSIC tail, the full ROM-derived CHANGE_MUSIC body under a documented pre-satisfied pack state, the full ROM-derived CHANGE_MUSIC body with real pack-decision branches and stubbed LOAD_SPC700_DATA calls, or the full ROM-derived CHANGE_MUSIC body starting from bootstrap APU RAM and applying selected LOAD_SPC700_DATA payload streams at the $062A command-read boundary, writes key-on SPC snapshots, and feeds them to the same libgme render pipeline. A focused C0:AB06 loader harness now executes the ROM-derived LOAD_SPC700_DATA routine bytes against a modeled APUIO receiver and checks the selected pack stream byte/block/terminal counts.
native_ares_harness.why_not_ok_yet: The SPC snapshot is structurally valid but diagnostic: the harness uses diagnostic command delivery instead of the real CPU/APU track-start handshake, does not use the full SMP scheduler/DSP timing path, does not finalize port state at a stable render boundary, and does not render PCM/WAV.

libgme_harness.current_capability: Consumes snes_spc backend job JSON, opens the matching fused CHANGE_MUSIC/key-on SPC snapshot through libgme, honors the job's seconds/sample-rate/channel render options, emits WAV/render metrics, and writes a schema-valid ok result.
libgme_harness.why_not_final: The renderer path works across the all-track fused CHANGE_MUSIC/key-on corpus, but release-quality confidence still needs an emulator-captured oracle comparison and any loop/fade/export policy decisions.
